creator: qjail1@a1poweruser.com
text: Your last comment is incorrect. The patch I posted here was just for the user who reported the problem in the first place, so he could patch his version on the fly. BUG number 211275 will fix this problem in the qjail source by updating the port system to qjail-5.0. This bug report 211255 is now completed as it stands and should be marked as fixed/done once 211275 gets committed.
